title: Top Dividend Stocks: Vistra Could Generate High Returns, But Risk Remains
text: Vistra, a top dividend stock, is the largest retail producer of electricity in the U.S. The post Top Dividend Stocks: Vistra Could Generate High Returns, But Risk Remains appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Vistra Energy: Buy, Hold, Or Sell?
text: So far this year, VST has outperformed the market by around 25%. This outperformance has been driven by aggressive buybacks and investment spending.
